"use strict"; module.exports = require('./loader')(window, loadImplementation) /** * Browser specific loadImplementation. Always uses `window.Promise` * * To register a custom implementation, must register with `Promise` option. */ function loadImplementation(){ if(typeof window.Promise === 'undefined'){ throw new Error("any-promise browser requires a polyfill or explicit registration"+ " e.g: require('any-promise/register/bluebird')") } return { Promise: window.Promise, implementation: 'window.Promise' } }
